background: Investigate the possibility of digit preference in the final digits of the following serum progesterone data (also shown as Group 2 in Table 14.13).

task.query: Determine whether there is a preference for certain final digits in the serum progesterone data.
task.answer: Almost half $(27 / 60)$ of the values end in zero. The other terminating digits are fairly evenly spread.

task.query: Explain the potential cause of the observed digit preference in the data.
task.answer: This effect may be due to different observers reporting data to different precision.
